title: Pantip SET Sentiment — Thai Stock Discussion NLP
description: Daily-updated sentiment scores for SET-listed Thai stocks, derived from Pantip.com discussion posts. Each row is a post linked to a stock ticker with a continuous sentiment score in [-1, 1] from a multilingual XLM-RoBERTa model. Note: replies and posted_at fields are best-effort — Pantip's React-rendered stats are not always available at scrape time and may be 0 or null for some posts.
